title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Language Clinic: Oop Duck Typing
summary: Support interchangeable storage, notification, pricing, and item-policy implementations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop duck typing increment in a protocol-driven circulation application. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.
Choose composition, protocols, delegation, or inheritance by variability, substitutability, ownership, and change cost.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

from typing import Any

content.text: Duck typing means errors should be ignored until production calls fail. This fails the Oop Duck Typing contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.
